def maxSubArray(nums):
    current_sum = nums[0]
    max_sum = nums[0]

    for i in range(1, len(nums)):
        # Decide whether to extend or restart
        current_sum = max(nums[i], current_sum + nums[i])
        
        # Update global maximum
        max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum)

    return max_sum

def maxSubArray(nums):
    current_sum = nums[0]
    max_sum = nums[0]

    for i in range(1, len(nums)):
        # Decide whether to extend or restart
        current_sum = max(nums[i], current_sum + nums[i])
        
        # Update global maximum
        max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum)

    return max_sum
